com.mentor.chs.api.servicedoc

Interface IXResourceGeneratorResult


  • public interface IXResourceGeneratorResult
    IXResourceGeneratorResult class allows a generator (e.g. instance of IXResourceGenerator) to add resources such as a local file or a remote URI (e.g. http://externalURI.com/myResource) into the generated package. An instance of this class is passed as parameter to method of a generator e.g. generateResources.
    See Also:
    IXResourceGenerator

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void addResource(java.net.URI uri, java.lang.String title, boolean copyIntoPackage)
      Links a resource specified by URI into the package.

    • Method Detail

      • addResource

        void addResource(java.net.URI uri,
                 java.lang.String title,
                 boolean copyIntoPackage)
        Links a resource specified by URI into the package. If called multiple times, multiple resources are linked in the order of method calls. If the method is called with the same URI multiple times, then the generated package will link to the same resource multiple times.
        Parameters:
        uri - URI pointing to a resource to link into the package
        title - title of the resource to be shown as a user friendly representation of the specified URI
        copyIntoPackage - copyIntoPackage flag indicating whether to copy a resource specified by the URI into the package and use a package relative local URI to link to the copied resource instead of using the specified URI. This flag applies only to resolvable, absolute or relative, file based URIs. The flag is ignored for all other cases and the package will link to URI without copying it into package.
